title: capnorea nana
intro: Capnorea nana, also known as the dwarf capnorea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of capnorea nana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Capnorea nana is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical cream or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
